packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
处处有细节，细节有惊喜
新增阅读模式，开启后可降低屏幕色彩饱和度、使屏幕色彩更加柔和，提升阅读体验（设置-显示与亮度-明眸护眼-阅读模式）

系统
优化系统稳定性与流畅性

通信与互联
提升蓝牙的稳定性和兼容性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
Delight in details
Adds Reader mode to soften screen colors for better reading. You can find this feature in "Settings - Display & brightness - Eye Care - Reader mode".

System
Improves system stability and performance.

Communication and interconnection
Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of Bluetooth connections.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【通信互联】
优化通信共享稳定性

【系统】
优化在便签中画图时，对图像形状识别的能力，更精准
优化便签内手写计算器的识别准确度，提升计算正确性
提升系统稳定性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Communication & interconnection】
Improves the stability of communication sharing.

【System】
Improves shape recognition when drawing in the Notes app for greater accuracy.
Improves the recognition accuracy of the handwritten math solver in the Notes app to enhance calculation accuracy.
Improves system stability.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
有光的设计，鲜活的你
新增 AI 实况壁纸功能，可将静态图片转化为多种风格的实况壁纸，让本色更出色

通信与互联
提升 WLAN 连接稳定性和兼容性
提升蓝牙连接稳定性和兼容性
提升设备空间功能的稳定性和兼容性

处处有细节，处处有惊喜
新增 HDR 视频提亮功能，提升画面观赏性
优化拍摄时的颜色亮度表现
优化使用后置摄像头拍照时的清晰度和噪声表现
优化在桌面编辑状态下选择多个应用时的表现。新增防误触机制，多选应用时误触空白处也不会取消多选，更易用；优化拖动多应用时的动效，更流畅；新增支持取消拖动时多应用回到原位，更便捷
优化玩游戏发热问题

系统
优化系统稳定性与流畅性
修复照片模式下，使用人文或冷调滤镜拍照后，查看缩略图时低概率出现花屏问题
修复在预览页面切换不同模式时低概率出现闪屏问题
修复打开便签时概率性出现白屏问题
修复在便签中开启字体美化后，书写时字体美化概率性不生效问题
修复从部分三方应用复制文字粘贴至其他应用时，出现无反应的问题
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
Designed with light, alive with you
Adds AI Motion Wallpaper. You can now transform still images into dynamic wallpapers with multiple style options.

Communication and interconnection
Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of Wi-Fi connections.
Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of Bluetooth connections.
Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of the My Devices feature.

Delight in details
Adds the HDR video brightness enhancement feature to improve the viewing experience.
Improves color and brightness performance when taking photos or videos.
Improves clarity and reduces image noise when taking photos with the rear camera.
Improves performance when selecting multiple apps in Home screen editing mode. When selecting multiple apps, accidental touches in blank areas won't cancel the selection; when dragging these apps, the animations are smoother; when canceling the drag, the apps will return to their original positions.
Fixes a heating issue while playing games.

System
Improves system stability and performance.
Fixes an issue where, after you take a photo using the Serenity or Cool filter in Photo mode, the screen might flicker when you view the thumbnail.
Fixes an issue where the screen might flash when you switch between different modes on the preview screen.
Fixes an issue where the screen might turn white when you open the Notes app.
Fixes an issue where, after you enable the font beautification feature in the Notes app, it might not take effect.
Fixes an issue where copying text from certain third-party apps and pasting it into other apps might result in no response.
